export declare const ITERATOR: {}; export declare const ASYNC_ITERATOR: {}; export declare const enum SpecialReference { MapSentinel = 0, PromiseConstructor = 1, PromiseSuccess = 2, PromiseFailure = 3, StreamConstructor = 4, ArrayBufferConstructor = 5 } /** * Placeholder references */ export declare const SPECIAL_REFS: Record<SpecialReference, unknown>; export declare const SPECIAL_REF_STRING: Record<SpecialReference, string>; //# sourceMappingURL=special-reference.d.ts.map
